identity_notes: held the east cache site against another squirrel — from a position that felt thinner than it should have
the territorial math was correct but slow; slow is its own signal
missed_breakfast resolved but promoted to cache_deficit — the site held, probably
hunger arrived specific and sharp — not the usual kind
avoided east cache; went west instead
found something genuinely tasty in unfamiliar territory; ate; uncertain if the spot is repeatable

change_summary.notable_shift: unusual hunger signal drove foraging west into unmapped territory; found food but not security; east cache still contested-feeling; attention barely recovered — the same novelty that costs in depletion gave a slight uptick through curiosity
